code: export class SlotMachineStateParser{constructor(){this._state='IDLE';this._reels=0;this._stops=[];this._win=0;this._bet=0;this._messages=[];}flush(){this._state='IDLE';this._reels=0;this._stops=[];this._win=0;this._bet=0;this._messages=[];return true;}parse(wrapper){if(!wrapper)return false;this._state=wrapper.readString()||'IDLE';this._reels=wrapper.readInt();const stopsLen=wrapper.readInt();this._stops=new Array(stopsLen);for(let i=0;i<stopsLen;i++)this._stops[i]=wrapper.readInt();this._win=wrapper.readInt();this._bet=wrapper.readInt();const mLen=wrapper.readInt();this._messages=new Array(mLen);for(let i=0;i<mLen;i++){const text=wrapper.readString();const level=wrapper.readString();this._messages[i]={text,level};}return true;}get state(){return this._state;}get reels(){return this._reels;}get stops(){return this._stops;}get win(){return this._win;}get bet(){return this._bet;}get messages(){return this._messages;}}
